titleStmt.title: SII 18.347: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 347. (B.K. No. 37 of 1932-33.) DĒVĪHOSŪR, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Broken stone in the temple of Bhōgēśvara.

summary.p: This fragmentary record is dated in Śaka 1082, Vikrama, lunar eclipse, Monday. In the given year there were two lunar eclipses, one in Bhādrapada and the other in Phālguṇa, corresponding respectively to A.D. 1160, August 18 and A.D. 1161, February 12. But neither of them occurred on Monday. The first was on Thursday and the second on Sunday. The latter being nearer to the week-day given in the record, it may be surmised that the grant was made actually on Sunday, though it was recorded on Monday.

It states that the one-thousand Mahājanas of Deyvada-Hosavūr (modern Dēvīhosūr) made a grant of land to the god Mūlasthāna-Bhōgēśvara (of that place). The gift was entrusted to Sōvarāsiguru of Posavūr. Mahāpradhāna Hegaḍe Bammarasa is extolled and a chief of the Jīmūtavāhana lineage is stated to be holding the manneya of Bāsvaūra One-hundred-and-forty.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṇḍana
resedippa khēcara su
ktre padumavvege viśrutama
nālaneṁdire pesariṭṭavarppaḍada
tana sutaṁ kallakṣitīśaṁge bhā
dikkāṁtege caṁḍabhānuvudeya
dhanyaṁ peṟardhdhanyarē . svasti samadhigatapa
mastavasumatītaḷakhyātaṁ jīmūtavāha
saṁ khacaravaṁśōttaṁśa padmāvatīdēvilabdhavarapra
madanivāraṇaṁ bhāvanagaṁdhavāraṇaṁ nāmādi pra
dēvarasaru bāsavūranūṟanālvattaṟa maṁneyadarasuge
śastisahitaṁ śrīmanumahāpradhānaṁ hegaḍe bammarasa
tsakuḷāṁbaradvimaṇi maṁtriśikhāmaṇi mānyavargga niṁrmmā
ṣṭadanuṁnatakīrttilakṣmigaṁ vatsaḷanapramattaceritaṁ sujanāgra
nutpavadiṁde baṁṇṇipudu baṁmacamūpana cārurūpana .
rāṁganegānalakṣmiyaṁdadiṁdanupamamoppi tōṟe bharatōrvvara ku(ṁ)ntaḷadaṁ
līḷeyaṁ taḷeye bhāḷaviḷāsamanā(ṁ)ntu śōbhikuṁ banavasenāḍadarkke tiḷa
dharitriyoḷu . varadha(ṁ)rmmapratipāḷakaru nirupamaprakhyā
ṇarkkōdayatējarartthijanatākalpadrumaru śīḷatatpararudyōtitavēdaśā
hityavidyāvidarārpparamārtthaṁ vasudhāmararssogayikuṁ sāsirvvarī grāma
yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhānajapasamādhi śīlaguṇasaṁ
pāsanāgnihōtradvijagurudēvatāpūjātatpararuṁ mārttāṁḍōjvaḷa kīrttitaruṁ
dēvilabdhavaraprasādaru(ṁ)mappa śrīmatu sarvvanamaśyadagraharaṁ deyvada ho
savūra sāsirvvaru sukhamirdu śakavarṣa 1082 vikramasaṁvatsarada sōmagrahaṇa vetīpāta sōmavāradaṁdu
svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyamōnānuṣṭhānajapasamādhisīlaguṇasaṁpannarappa
posaūrusōvarāsi gurugāḷage sāsirvvaru śrīmūlasthāna bhōgēsvaradēvaThese letters seem to have been engraved later, after
rge sarvvabhādhaparihāravāgi biṭṭaru . . khaṁḍasphuṭitajīrnnōrdharakaṁ dhūpadīpa naivēdyaSome letters
kkendu biṭṭa bhūmiyeṁtteṁdaḍe māḷacādēviyiṁ baḍagalu Eremattalu Eraḍu heggeṟe
ya keḷage gaddekaṁmavippatu 20 vūriṁdaṁ teṁkalu dēvigeṟeya keḷage kisukaṁ mavippa
tu 20 Iṁtī dharmmama svadharmmadiṁ pratipāḷisidavargge vāraṇāśiprayāgeyarghyatī
rttha karukṣētradalu sahasrakavileya kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ navaratnadalu khaciyi
si sahasra carturvvēda pāragargge koṭṭa phalamaku . yiṁtī dharmmamanaḷida paṁcamahā pātakaraku
Ayivattokkalu soṁṭṭigeyaṇneya biṭṭaru . śrīmatu Ainūrvvaru maḷigeyāya sīreya maḷavege bēḷeya biṭṭaru .
Digital edition of SII 18.347 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
